title: Alex Franklin Kiss Me X
description: What if we kissed right now? Like, obviously I’m kidding. But genuinely? I’m just asking questions. About kissing. Like what do we think of that? I’m kissi- I mean kidding! But we could! Right here! Do you have someone to practice kissing with? Do you want it to be me? X As seen / heard on Channel 4 / HBO Max / BBC Radio 4. 'Deeply affecting and incredibly funny' ★★★★★ (The Wee Review). 'A one-woman multiverse of gleeful possibility' ★★★★½ (The Reviews Hub). 'Fabulously funny, absurd and intelligent' ★★★★ (Everything Theatre).
